title: delphinium brachycentrum subsp. maydellianum
intro: Delphinium brachycentrum subsp. maydellianum, also known as Maydell's delphinium, is a subspecies of the delphinium plant native to China and Mongolia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Maydell's delphinium include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Maydell's delphinium is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, such as ethanol.
